---
title: "Iron Hong"
image: images/rot2025.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: righttocity123@gmail.com
      href: mailto:righttocity123@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: iron-hong
      href: https://github.com/iron-hong
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?hl=ko&user=LUjF0tAAAAAJ
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Dr.Hong's research interests lie in smart cities, inclusive planning, health city
planning, its applications in quantitative analysis, and big data analytics. He
obtained a doctoral degree in city planning from Seoul National University, with
a dissertation on "Essays on the Relationships Among Urban Environment,
Social Capital, and Subjective Well-Being" (in English). To date, he has published
a total of 10 papers in representative journals (SSCI and KCI), with works
featured in publications such as “Journal of Housing and the Built Environment”,
“International Journal of Urban Sciences”, “Social Indicators Research”, “Journal
of Korea Planning Association”, and serve as an anonymous reviewer for several
SSCI journals, including Social Indicators Research and BMC Public Health.


## Background
- 2024-2026: Visiting Researcher, Environmental Planning Institute, Seoul National University, South Korea.
- 2019-2024: PhD in City Planning, Department of Environmental Planning, Seoul National University, Gwanak-gu, Seoul, South Korea.
- 2018-2019: PhD course in Urban Administration, University of Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu, Seoul, South Korea.
- 2015-2017: Master of Urban Administration, University of Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu, Seoul, South Korea.
- 2013-2015: Bachelor of Marketing, Dankook University, Yongin city, South Korea.

:::
